intro h
  cases π with
  | fromRoot πp => cases πp with
    | stopLeaf hleaf => exfalso; simp_all [PreState.lforms]
    | edge e enotmod πpn => cases e with
      | YS next mPos nPos nPos_in mvs hbt defn =>
        cases mvs with
        | prPdl r => cases r with
          | modL L R a ξ X_def Y_def => simp_all [PreState.lforms]
          | modR L R a ξ X_def Y_def => simp_all [PreState.lforms]
          | _ => exfalso; simp_all [PreState.lforms]
        | _ => exfalso; simp_all [PreState.lforms]
    | stopAtM e emod => cases e with
      | YS next mPos nPos nPos_in mvs hbt defn =>
        cases mvs with
        | prPdl r => cases r with
          | modL L R a ξ X_def Y_def =>
            use .stop
            constructor
            · simp_all [AnyNegFormula.mem_Sequent]
            · use PreState.fromRoot (.stopLeaf (by simp [Match.isLeaf]))
              use .stop
              simp_all [Modelgraphs.Q]
          | modR L R a ξ X_def Y_def =>
            use .stop
            constructor
            · simp_all [AnyNegFormula.mem_Sequent]
            · use PreState.fromRoot (.stopLeaf (by simp [Match.isLeaf]))
              use .stop
              simp_all [Modelgraphs.Q]
          | _ => exfalso; simp_all [PreState.lforms]
        | _ => exfalso; simp_all [PreState.lforms]
  | fromMod e emod πp => cases e with
    | YS next mPos nPos nPos_in mvs hbt defn =>
      cases mvs with
      | prPdl r => cases r with
        | modL L R a ξ X_def Y_def =>
          use .stop
          constructor
          · simp_all [AnyNegFormula.mem_Sequent]
          · use PreState.fromRoot (.stopLeaf (by simp [Match.isLeaf]))
            use .stop
            simp_all [Modelgraphs.Q]
        | modR L R a ξ X_def Y_def =>
          use .stop
          constructor
          · simp_all [AnyNegFormula.mem_Sequent]
          · use PreState.fromRoot (.stopLeaf (by simp [Match.isLeaf]))
            use .stop
            simp_all [Modelgraphs.Q]
        | _ => exfalso; simp_all [PreState.lforms]
      | _ => exfalso; simp_all [PreState.lforms]

intro h
  cases π with
  | fromRoot πp =>
    induction πp with
    | edge e ne πp ih =>
      cases e with
      | YS next mPos nPos nPos_in mvs h def_n =>
        cases mvs with
        | prPdl r =>
          cases r with
          | modL L R a ξ X_def Y_def =>
            simp_all
          | modR L R a ξ X_def Y_def =>
            simp_all
          | _ => contradiction
        | _ => contradiction
    | stopLeaf isLeaf =>
      cases isLeaf with
      | m_pos rp hbt =>
        simp_all
    | stopAtM e isModal =>
      cases e with
      | YS next mPos nPos nPos_in mvs h def_n =>
        cases mvs with
        | prPdl r =>
          cases r with
          | modL L R a ξ X_def Y_def =>
            simp_all
          | modR L R a ξ X_def Y_def =>
            simp_all
          | _ => contradiction
        | _ => contradiction
  | fromMod e isModal πp =>
    cases e with
    | YS next mPos nPos nPos_in mvs h def_n =>
      cases mvs with
      | prPdl r =>
        cases r with
        | modL L R a ξ X_def Y_def =>
          simp_all
        | modR L R a ξ X_def Y_def =>
          simp_all
        | _ => contradiction
      | _ => contradiction
